title: Melanosis coli: harmless pigmentation? A case-control retrospective study of 657 cases
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ecukh","text":"Backgrounds and aims: The association of melanosis coli with the development of","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3sded","text":"colorectal polyps remains uncertain.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b4o0a","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dgupi","text":"Methods: From a total of 18263 patients who had received colonoscopy in our hospital,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5gr13","text":"219 with melanosis coli cases and 438 controls matched by age and sex (at 1:2 ratio)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"hga3","text":"were included in this study. The association of incidence, number, location, and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1u3u7","text":"pathology of colorectal neoplasm with grades and distribution of melanosis coli were","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4rmva","text":"analyzed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bv34t","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"506r0","text":"Results: Melanosis coli was associated with significantly more colorectal polyps than","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cag80","text":"control, a higher incidence of numerous colorectal polyps (number ≥ 20) (7.3% vs","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fdugh","text":"0.5%; p \u003c 0.001), and higher number of small colorectal polyps (diameter ≤ 5 mm; p \u003c","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3qtqk","text":"0.01). Patients with melanosis coli had higher incidences of low-grade adenomas","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1tcnf","text":"(31.1% vs 23.3%, p \u003c 0.05) and non-adenoma polyps (20.1% vs 12.8%, p \u003c 0.05) than","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bofhj","text":"the controls. On multivariate analysis, melanosis coli was independently associated","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"96ldp","text":"with increased detecting rates of low grade adenoma (OR = 1.54; 95%: 1.06-2.23; p \u003c","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3548b","text":".05), non-adenoma polyp (OR = 1.72; 95%: 1.11-2.70; p \u003c .05) and numerous polyps","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"54tv8","text":"(OR = 16.2, 95%: 3.66-71.6; p \u003c .05). There was no significant difference in the","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8352g","text":"incidence of high-grade adenomas or adenocarcinomas in the two population groups,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5f4ap","text":"but the numbers of these lesions were insufficient to permit firm conclusions. No","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2es3u","text":"significant differences in incidence, number, and pathology of colorectal polyps","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"panr","text":"between individuals with melanosis coli of three different grades of severity were found.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81tdc","text":"Melanosis located predominantly in the right colon had an interestingly lower incidence","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"13boe","text":"of colonic polyps in right colon than did melanosis located predominantly in the left","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9k04","text":"colon or total colon (8.9% vs. 26.3%, 24.0%, p \u003c 0.05). Patients with melanosis coli","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2piv7","text":"had significantly more nonspecific distal ileal ulcers than did controls (8.0% vs 0%, p \u003c","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3hp18","text":"0.001).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6f64m","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dqj7b","text":"Conclusion: Melanosis coli is associated with a higher incidence and number of colonic","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bjfse","text":"non-adenoma polyps and low-grade adenomas, and higher incidence of distal ileal","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6r774","text":"ulcers. Melanosis coli may not be a harmless pigmentation, but a sign of chronic injury","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"66n60","text":"of colonic and intestinal mucosa.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3uolb","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Joe Fan
